author: pd-codes
name: ReactionRole
short: Simple ReactionRole system with IDs and manual sync
description: Adds reaction roles with generated IDs, supports manual syncing and slash commands.
install_msg: ReactionRole loaded. See [p]help ReactionRole to set up reaction roles.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild reaction-role mappings (message, emoji and role IDs). It does not store personal user data.
